key_findings: 66% of insurer responses are templated repeats.
The phrase "we regret to inform" appeared in 12 emails.
Documents were requested 3 times in 8 days - after being told they do not exist.
Issue has been open for 224 days with no resolution.
The insurer voided the policy in Oct 2025, then sent a renewal payment notice in Jan 2026.
On March 12, one ABHI department rejected the claim while another said "your policy is active, pay premium to continue."
ABHI also sent a "successfully renewed" policy document on the same day as the rejection.
Policybazaar is still sending renewal reminders for the voided policy.
